fast.title: Lightning Fast

about.openSourceDesc: We appreciate the following open source projects that are an important part of our service

contact.title: We'd Love to Hear from You
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions, suggestions, or feedback, please don't hesitate to contact us. We'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.emailDesc: Send an email to the address below, we'll reply within 24 hours:
contact.githubDesc: View our projects on GitHub, submit Issues or Pull Requests:

feedback.a: You can send your feature suggestions via email or GitHub. We carefully consider every suggestion and try to include them in future development plans.

bug.a: Please submit an Issue on GitHub with detailed information about the problem, including your browser, file type, and error message. We'll fix it as soon as possible.

replyTime.q: How long does it take to get a reply?
replyTime.a: We usually reply to your email within 24 hours. Urgent issues will be prioritized.

api.q: Can I apply for API access?
api.a: We currently don't provide a public API. For business cooperation needs, please contact us via email to discuss specific plans.

contact.startNowDesc: Experience free, fast, and secure PDF conversion service

ssl.title: SSL Encrypted Transfer
ssl.desc: All data transfers are encrypted with SSL/TLS to ensure data security.

autoDelete.title: Auto-delete in 30 Minutes
autoDelete.desc: All uploaded files are automatically deleted from the server within 30 minutes after processing.

noStore.title: No Sensitive Data Stored
noStore.desc: We do not store your account information, passwords, or other sensitive personal data.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: PDF Converter (hereinafter referred to as "we") is committed to protecting user privacy and data security. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information. By using our services, you agree to the terms of this privacy policy.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.content: The information we collect is only used to provide and improve services. Specifically:
items: Uploaded files: Your PDF, Word, or image files are only used for conversion processing and not for other purposes.
Technical information: Browser type, device type, etc. are used to optimize the service experience.
Usage data: Access time, features used, etc. are used to improve service quality.

usage.title: Data Usage
usage.content: The data we collect is only used for the following purposes:
items: Ensure service security and prevent abuse
Provide technical support (only when you proactively contact us)

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We do not share your file data with any third parties. We may use the following third-party services to operate the website, but these services do not access your file content:
items: Website analytics tools (to understand website usage)

cookies.title: Cookie Usage
items: Analyze website usage to improve services
cookies.extra: You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect the experience of some features.

rights.title: Your Rights
items: Know what data we have collected
Request deletion of your data (files are automatically deleted within 30 minutes)

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our services are not directed to children under 13. If you are a parent and discover your child has used our services, please contact us and we will take appropriate measures.

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Significant changes will be announced on this page. We recommend you regularly review this policy to stay informed.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any privacy-related questions, please contact us through the following methods:

terms.title: Terms of Service
usageRules: Only upload files you have the right to process
Do not upload files containing illegal, harmful, or infringing content
Do not attempt todisrupt, interfere with, or abuse this service
Do not use automated tools to call this service on a large scale
Comply with the laws and regulations of your jurisdiction

accept.title: Acceptance of Terms
accept.content: By using PDF Converter (hereinafter referred to as "we" or "this service"), you agree to comply with these terms of service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use this service. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time, and modified terms take effect immediately upon publication on this page.

description.title: Service Description
description.content: PDF Converter provides the following online document processing services:

rules.title: Usage Rules
rules.content: When using this service, you agree to:
rules.warning: ⚠️ Note: Single file size limit is 20MB. Files exceeding this limit cannot be processed.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: The intellectual property of the files you upload and the content in the conversion results belongs to the original owners. This service does not acquire, claim, or transfer any intellectual property. We only provide technical conversion services and do not have any rights to the file content.
ip.extra: The design, code, trademarks, etc. of this website belong to us and may not be copied or used without authorization.

privacy.title: Privacy Protection
privacy.content: We value your privacy. Please refer to our privacy policy for detailed information.
items: All uploaded files are automatically deleted after 30 minutes

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This service is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranties, including but not limited to:
items: Accuracy and completeness of conversion results
disclaimer.extra: For scanned PDFs, the conversionresult depends on the clarity of the original document and may not be perfectlyrestored. We are not responsible for any consequences of using the conversion results.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we are not liable for:
items: Any direct or indirect losses caused by using this service

termination.title: Service Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to terminate or restrict your use of this service in the following cases:
items: You violate these terms of service
Your behavior harms other users or this service

changes.title: Terms Changes
changes.content: We may modify these terms of service at any time. Modified terms will be published on this page. Continued use of this service constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. We recommend you regularly check this page for the latest terms.

law.title: Applicable Law
law.content: These terms of service are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China. In case of disputes, both parties should resolve them through friendly negotiation; if negotiation fails, they may file a lawsuit with a court of competent jurisdiction.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these terms of service, please contact us through the following methods:

blog.title: PDF Conversion Guide
blog.subtitle: Learn PDF processing tips, format conversion tutorials, and document optimization methods
blog.comingSoonDesc: We are preparing high-quality PDF conversion tutorials, stay tuned!
blog.readyDesc: Use our free online tools to quickly and securely convert between PDF and Word

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word Online Converter
pdfToWord.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents (.doc/.docx) for free, preserving original formatting and layout

faq.q: Will the format be messed up after converting PDF to Word?
faq.a: Our conversion engine uses advanced OCR technology and format recognition algorithms to preserve the original document's layout, images, and tables to the greatest extent.

faq.q: Can scanned PDFs be converted?
faq.a: Yes. Our system supports OCR recognition and can convert scanned PDFs to editable Word documents.

wordToPdf.title: Word to PDF Online Converter
wordToPdf.description: Convert Word documents (.doc/.docx) to PDF format for free, perfectly preserving original layout and formatting

faq.q: Will the format change after converting Word to PDF?
faq.a: Our conversion engine perfectly preserves the Word document's format, images, tables, and layout.

faq.q: What Word formats are supported?
faq.a: Both .doc and .docx formats are supported. We recommend using .docx for the best conversion results.

pdfToJpg.title: PDF to JPG Online Converter
pdfToJpg.description: Convert PDF files to JPG/PNG image format for free, supporting single page or batch conversion

faq.q: Will every page of the PDF be converted to an image?
faq.a: Yes, every page of the PDF will be converted to a separate JPG image file.

faq.q: How is the image quality after conversion?
faq.a: We convert at high quality to ensure images are clear and readable.

jpgToPdf.title: JPG to PDF Online Converter
jpgToPdf.description: Merge and convert JPG/PNG images to PDF files for free, supporting multi-image merging

faq.q: Can multiple images be merged?
faq.a: Yes, you can upload multiple images and we will merge them into a single PDF file.

faq.q: What image formats are supported?
faq.a: Common image formats including JPG, JPEG, and PNG are supported.

mergePdf.title: Merge PDF Online Tool
mergePdf.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one PDF document for free, preserving original formatting

faq.q: Can I merge multiple PDF files?
faq.a: Yes, you can upload multiple PDF files and we will merge them into one file.

faq.q: Can the order be adjusted after merging?
faq.a: Yes, you can adjust the order of PDF files after uploading.

compressPdf.title: Compress PDF Online Tool
compressPdf.description: Compress PDF file size for free, reducing size while maintaining quality

faq.q: Will quality be affected after compression?
faq.a: We use intelligent compression algorithms to reduce file size while maintaining quality as much as possible.

faq.q: How small can it be compressed?
faq.a: Compressionresult depends on the original PDF content, typically reducing size by 30-70%.

removePages.title: Remove PDF Pages Tool
removePages.description: Delete specified pages from PDF files for free,preserving other pages

faq.q: Can I delete multiple pages?
faq.a: Yes, you can delete single or multiple PDF pages.

faq.q: Can deleted pages be recovered?
faq.a: Deletion is irreversible, please confirm before proceeding.

splitPdf.title: Split PDF Online Tool
splitPdf.description: Split PDF files into multiple documents for free, supporting page-by-page splitting

faq.q: Can I split by page range?
faq.a: Yes, you can split PDF files by page range or individual pages.

faq.q: How is the quality of split files?
faq.a: Split PDFs retain the original quality and formatting.

rearrangePdf.title: Rearrange PDF Pages Tool
rearrangePdf.description: Adjust the order of pages in PDF files for free, supporting drag-and-drop sorting

faq.q: How do I adjust page order?
faq.a: After uploading, you can drag and drop to adjust the order of PDF pages.

faq.q: Can I duplicate pages?
faq.a: Yes, you can duplicate pages in the PDF to generate a new PDF with repeated pages.

imageCompress.title: Image Compress Online Tool
imageCompress.description: Compress JPG/PNG image file sizes for free, reducing size while maintaining quality

faq.q: How is image quality after compression?
faq.a: We use intelligent compression algorithms to reduce file size while maintaining quality as much as possible.

faq.q: Is batch compression supported?
faq.a: Yes, batch compression of multiple images is supported for better efficiency.

imageWatermark.title: Image Watermark Online Tool
imageWatermark.description: Add text or image watermarks to images for free, supporting custom watermark styles

faq.q: Is text watermark supported?
faq.a: Yes, you can add custom text watermarks with configurable font, color, and position.

faq.q: Can I adjust watermark opacity?
faq.a: Yes, you can adjust the watermark's opacity and rotation angle.

metadata.siteTitle: PDF Converter - Free Online PDF Conversion Tool
metadata.siteDescription: Free online PDF conversion tool supporting PDF to Word, image, and other format conversions. Fast, secure, no registration required.
